about_item: DOG PURSE CARRIER FOR SMALL DOGS: This pet purse carrier measures 17 x 8 x 11 inches (L x W x H), Weight Limit up to 12 lbs. Before purchasing please measure your pet - LENGTH: neck to base of tail; HEIGHT: floor to top of shoulder. This soft sided dog carrier purse is designed for carrying small to medium dogs or large cats. Soft, lightweight and portable, the puppy carry tote with sherpa bed brings the most convenience and comfort for the furry baby. Perfect for traveling, walking, training.

BREATHABLE SOFT PUPPY CARRIER: This small dog carrier bag comes with ventilated mesh and holes for optimal airflow and pet's temperature regulated. The soft sided kitten purse carrier is firmly structured with ample room for the pet to move around, and comes with a removable thick cozy sherpa lined bed for relaxing and sleeping. The doggie traveling bag comes with one collapsible silicone dog bowl, ensuring the pet is hydrated during car seat trips, camping, bike travels.

SAFE CAT CARRYING TOTE BAG: The dog soft-sided carrier purse is made with durable 6000D high grade polyester for a long-lasting experience, making it just as safe as an animal crate, cage, kennel when used indoors. The cute puppy handbag carrier has an entire top opening for convenient entry and a zipped cover flap for privacy. For peace of mind, this dog carrying bag tote is equipped with safety buckle zippers and strap for harness and leash to secure the doggie and prevent escape.

AIRLINE APPROVED PURSE PET CARRIER: Airline compliant and fits under most airplane seats, this tsa approved pet carrier is easy to carry on for any travel and outdoor activity. The handle strap is sturdy and durable, allowing you to carry this dog tote bag by hand or on your shoulder. The pet carrier also comes with a front large pocket and a mesh pocket on the back to store pet stuff, treats, food, toys, or personal items, phone and cards, making it the most convenient cat carrier for any trip.

SMALL DOG TRAVEL ACCESSORIES GIFT: The small pet carrier is a must have puppy accessories and supplies for indoor cats, and an ideal travel gift idea essentials for new dog mom, dad, parents. The dog holder handbag carrier makes a great gift present for new pet owners and trainers, and it's good for vet visit, shopping, camping. Fits most small and medium sized pets, dogs, cats, puppies girl or boy, newborn kitten, bunny rabbit, chinchilla guinea pig, chihuahua, yorkie, dachshund, teacup dog.

summary.text: Customers find this dog carrier to be well-made and appreciate its appearance, noting it looks like a gym bag. The size is suitable for small dogs, particularly 12 lb puppies, and customers like its portability for travel. They praise its comfort, with one mentioning the padding inside, and appreciate the storage spots. The sturdiness receives mixed reviews, with some finding it sturdy while others say it's not.

authors_reviews.title: Chose this bag over all the others
authors_reviews.text: I recently got a tiny Chihuahua puppy that I plan to take everywhere with me. I have ordered and returned at least eight different bags of various styles and this is the one I chose to keep for these reasons.Because my dog is so small a sling or backpack carrier does not work because he gets jostled around too much. With this one I like the option that I can put it over my shoulder like a purse or I can also carry it with my hand hanging down by my leg or on my arm and keep it from bouncing against my body. It came with a cute little fleece bed and collapsible bowl, both of which I will use. I really like the lock on the zippers to keep them closed, the leash to attach the dog to the inside of the bag and the hard section velcroed to the top of the bag that keeps it from collapsing in up at the top.Initially, when I received the bag, the weather was warm and I almost didn’t keep the bag because I thought it didn’t have enough ventilation. But I ended up purchasing a second bag that’s all mesh and I plan to keep them both and alternate between which one is most appropriate given the weather and the circumstances.Now that the weather is cooling down, I do like that I can completely close up this bag, I am realizing there will be circumstances like inside of restaurants, on airplanes, etc., where it will be nice to either keep him concealed or keep things quiet and dark for him.Out of all the bags I tried, this one had the best handles because of the shape and length, they have enough of a drop to be functional, but not too much. Their rigidness makes them also easier to use and the small Velcro section at the top to keep the handles closed or to allow them to open is also nicer than any of the other bags I tried.The bag has pockets however you really only can fit flat items in the pockets which led me to look for additional bags with more and bigger pockets so I can take things that I need like a wallet, etc., or things that the dog would need such as food and toys, however, those bags just weren’t as good as this bag in regards to all of the other features, so I decided to forgo looking for one bag to do everything and use this bag, which is best suited for the dog and just carry along my purse.As I have been using it, the only criticisms that I have are that if I wanted the screen top to be open, there’s no way to roll that up and Velcro it aside and when I roll up and Velcro the very top section the elastic strap is almost not long enough to hold it unless I roll it very small in which case I am bending the leather-like piece and denting which I’m trying not to do.I wish that the bottom also had metal feet because I do find myself wanting to sit the carrier on the ground at times.The only other thing I don’t care for is the light colored interior, I generally go with black because it’s easy to keep looking clean. I don’t do so well with white or light colors. I don’t know if there is a reason the interior is white, perhaps it keeps the bag cooler, I’m not sure, but it does seem that that satin finish will be easy to clean and I really do like the fleece dog bed, it’s a nice touch and it fits perfectly in the bag, my puppy likes it.To try to keep things clean I also put a little baby receiving blanket in there for him to cuddle up with.For reference my purse in the picture is a small size purse and my puppy is only 2 1/2 pounds In the picture.He does chew the mesh screen, his little teeth go through the mesh holes and his little nails get caught on the screen, but the bag has not sustained any damage.
authors_reviews.author: Tami

authors_reviews.title: By far-the BEST!!!
authors_reviews.text: I am sure Amazon will tell you how many pet carriers I returned in search of the best one.This is it.This company thought of everything that is needed in a pet carrier, including good ventilation, safety so the pet cannot escape, comfort, latches that hold it closed, washability, quality and sturdiness, pockets for carrying important things to and from the vet or when on a trip, ease of carrying with handles that fit easily over the shoulder and not to mention that it is the most attractive carrier on the market!I recently used this carrier to take my pet on the ferry, and I packed everything that I needed with her, including her medication‘s in the pockets, and I locked all the latches to make sure she could not escape accidentally. It was the safest kind of case for her as she came out of anesthesia because the sides of the crate provided padding. She felt secure because the peep holes are in exactly the right spots so she could see out if she wanted to or “hide” if needed. At home, these carriers are easy to store-folding and hanging on hooks. I put the entire carrier- after removing the removable plastic bottom-in my washing machine on gentle cycle and it came out like new!I’m so glad I found this company!!!!!!
authors_reviews.author: ls

authors_reviews.title: Excellent quality, better than others!!
authors_reviews.text: I absolutely love this carrier! We drove several states over to pick up two kittens. This carrier worked wonderfully for the trip, and they have continued to use it as an occasional bed. I will be using it in the future for small trips. Super sturdy well made zipper open and closes like butter, sturdy and stylish! One of my favorite purchases in recent memory! Go for this one!! Handles are what sold me on this, but the whole bag is awesome!
authors_reviews.author: HotANDsunny

authors_reviews.title: My little guy has started to love it!
authors_reviews.text: Overall very good! My dog is a bit long and weighs ~10 pounds. I was worried he would not fit comfortably but he enjoys sitting in the carrier with his head looking out the top! And occasionally will lay / look out the front panel.Last time he came to the store with us in this, he laid down and was so relaxed he didn’t want to get out!The good- very cute style, good size for my boy, and clearly very comfy. Also, I like the Velcro allows me to roll back the fabric and give my dog air and allows him to see. Finally I like the leash inside, makes us feel secure. Seems sturdy and good quality!Could be improved - I wish that this carrier connected the front window to the top- like a u shape, I think that would improve my boy’s comfort SOOO much. Also, just a little bit of cushion along the top liner would be nice. My dog loves resting his chin on it and seems comfy enough but a little padding would go along way. Finally, there are velcro straps to hold pieces in place, but there seems to be one missing in the front panel to keep the mesh down.Overall I would recommend and very happy with the purchase. My little guy is picky and likes this carrier. He is likely too big for this to be a true travel carrier for him, but perfect for trips to the store etc.
authors_reviews.author: Kay

authors_reviews.title: This bag is pure perfection!
authors_reviews.text: I am obsessed with this pet carrier/bag. I have been looking for one of these full coverage bags for years. The quality of this bag is incredible. I love the cute design and it’s super lightweight, makes it so much easier to take her everywhere!!! All the pockets are great too! This has a lot of room for my 5 pound Maltese. I think she loves it. I might just have to buy another one to keep on hand.
authors_reviews.author: Tina Wei

authors_reviews.title: Teal for real
authors_reviews.text: It's very nice. Love the color. Love the design. Good buy at reasonable price. Very comfy for pup. Very secure.
authors_reviews.author: Cheryl Wilson-Green

other_countries_reviews.author: Magaly

other_countries_reviews.title: Transportadora perfecta para mi mascota
other_countries_reviews.text: Puedo viajar con mi perrita a todos lados, en el transporte público ni siquiera notan que la llevo. Ella se siente segura. La "rigidez" en la parte de arriba se la da una especie de cartón que se pega con "velcro" al otro lado, así el perro no va apachurrado. Las bolsas para llevar sus cosas son muy prácticas. Para mi, llevarla en el hombro no es tan cómodo, pero eso se compensa pues mi perra va muy tranquila y segura. Eso si, es para perros minis, la mía pesa 2 kilos. Sin duda es la mejor transportadora que he tenido.
other_countries_reviews.author: Diana GR

other_countries_reviews.title: Muy linda
other_countries_reviews.text: Es muy linda la mochilita y parece que a mí minino también le gustó , eso sí, es para tamaños chicos o medianos, mi minino tiene 3 meses
